subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth unto him who hath turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon and believed in God, the Lord of all worlds. Say: He hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق لمن توجه الی الافق الاعلی و آمن بالله رب العالمین قل قد ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @purpose; goal of creation
